rule_metadata.name: SUSP_LNK_Suspicious_Folders_Jan25
rule_metadata.description: Detects link files (.LNK) with suspicious folders mentioned in the target path
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_LNK_Suspicious_Folders_Jan25
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects link files (.LNK) with suspicious folders mentioned in the target path"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "Internal Research"
		date = "2025-01-24"
		score = 65
		id = "5f1bcd18-abec-5831-b24f-519c92a2454e"

	strings:
		$x1 = "RECYCLER.BIN\\" wide
		$x2 = "Perflogs\\" wide

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x004c and 1 of them
}
